case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VS. ROBERT MARLER

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MARLER, ROBERT
